description_long: This house features a striking geometric facade with a mix of wood and black triangular patterns, set on a rectangular plot with a green and black patterned ground. The structure has a prominent gable roof made of wood, with the roof planes intersecting at a central ridge. One side of the house is partially open, revealing a modern interior with visible staircases and open-plan spaces. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large openings and others more subtle, contributing to a contemporary aesthetic. The entryway is integrated into the patterned facade, lacking a traditional porch but featuring a flush, modern door. The overall design is bold and modern, with a focus on angular lines and contrasting materials.
description: A modern house with a geometric wood and black patterned facade, gable roof, and asymmetrical windows, set on a patterned green base.
description_view_0: This view shows the open side of the house, revealing the interior layout, staircases, and the bold geometric facade with large window openings.
description_view_1: The top-down view highlights the gable roof's intersecting planes and the patterned ground surrounding the house.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the uninterrupted geometric wood and black pattern, with minimal window openings and a solid, angular profile.
description_view_3: The rear top-down view shows the solid roof and the darker, less detailed side of the house, with the patterned ground extending behind.
attribute_entryway_design: Flush modern door integrated into the patterned facade, no porch, minimal overhang
